svg.title: Mission Control: Customer Operations Runtime
svg.desc: End-to-end operational request lifecycle from intake JSON through policy gate, escalation, higher authority review, approved execution, controlled release, persisted receipt, replay verification, audit trail, and dashboard.
svg.text: Every action is recorded and traceable.
Any decision can be reproduced and verified.
Unmet conditions result in refusal, never guesswork.
All decisions are grounded in evidence and policy.
GOVERNED EXECUTION. PROTECTED EFFECTS. AUDITABLE BY DESIGN. REPLAYABLE ALWAYS.
